span.p: Bermuda insurer — capital / solvency in scope

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Special structure?
ILS / SPI / segregated-account company

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Structure changes capital + reporting treatment
confirm the structural form FIRST
(SPI / SAC / collateralized) before modeling

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Determine the general class
(e.g. Class 1/2/3/3A/3B/4)
scale + nature of business drives it

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Determine the long-term class
(e.g. Class A-E + IIGB / Innovative)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Map class -> capital regime:
MMS + ECR (BSCR or approved internal model)
EBS valuation basis where it applies

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Confirm SII-equivalence / ICS interaction
+ group supervision (Insurance Group rules)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
State the regime explicitly in the model/memo
every figure inherits this assumption
